user.title: OBD-II BLE Adapter
user.description: Select your OBD-II Bluetooth LE adapter from the discovered devices below. If it doesn't appear, make sure it's powered on and select “Enter address manually”.

error.invalid_mac_address: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OBD-II adapter. Ensure it is powered on and in range of a Bluetooth proxy.
error.no_device_selected: Please select a device from the list.

abort.already_configured: This OBD-II adapter is already configured.
